query:
-- Check book_profiles rows with orphaned authorNames
SELECT bookTitle, authorName
FROM book_profiles
WHERE authorName IN (
  'Ashvin Vaidyanathan',
  'Colin Bryar',
  'Frances Frei',
  'Jack Stack',
  'The Only Negotiating System You Need by Jim Camp'
)
ORDER BY authorName, bookTitle;
